gemstones.name: Ruby
gemstones.description: Ruby is the king of gemstones, known for its deep red color and powerful energy. It represents passion, courage, and vitality.
gemstones.benefits: Boosts confidence, leadership qualities, and protects from negative energies. Enhances creativity and brings recognition.
gemstones.wearingMethod: Wear on Sunday in gold ring on ring finger after sun rise.

gemstones.name: Emerald
gemstones.description: Emerald symbolizes wisdom, growth, and patience. Its green color brings harmony and balance to life.
gemstones.benefits: Improves memory, communication skills, and financial stability. Brings peace and emotional balance.
gemstones.wearingMethod: Wear on Wednesday in silver ring on little finger.

gemstones.name: Pearl
gemstones.description: Pearl represents purity, innocence, and emotional balance. It's the only gemstone created by a living creature.
gemstones.benefits: Calms emotions, strengthens relationships, and brings mental peace. Excellent for emotional healing.
gemstones.wearingMethod: Wear on Monday in silver on ring finger.

gemstones.name: Diamond
gemstones.description: Diamond is the ultimate symbol of strength, clarity, and commitment. It amplifies positive energies.
gemstones.benefits: Enhances creativity, luxury, and spiritual growth. Brings success in creative fields.
gemstones.wearingMethod: Wear on Friday in platinum or gold on middle finger.

gemstones.name: Red Coral
gemstones.description: Red Coral is known for its protective energies and warrior-like qualities. It brings courage and vitality.
gemstones.benefits: Protects from evil eye, boosts physical strength, and brings career success.
gemstones.wearingMethod: Wear on Tuesday in copper or gold on ring finger.

gemstones.name: Yellow Sapphire
gemstones.description: Yellow Sapphire represents wisdom, prosperity, and good fortune. It's associated with Jupiter's blessings.
gemstones.benefits: Attracts wealth, success in education, and marital bliss. Brings overall prosperity.
gemstones.wearingMethod: Wear on Thursday in gold on index finger.

gemstones.name: Blue Sapphire
gemstones.description: Blue Sapphire is a fast-acting gemstone associated with Saturn. It brings discipline and focus.
gemstones.benefits: Brings career success, spiritual growth, and protection from enemies.
gemstones.wearingMethod: Wear on Saturday in silver or iron on middle finger.

gemstones.name: Amethyst
gemstones.description: Amethyst is a powerful protective stone that enhances spiritual awareness and intuition.
gemstones.benefits: Promotes calmness, sobriety, and spiritual protection. Excellent for meditation.
gemstones.wearingMethod: Wear on Saturday in silver on ring finger.
